title: Stocks Rise for Third Day as Oil Extends Decline: Markets Wrap
summary: A rally in global stocks extended into a third day, as investors looked past near-term geopolitical tensions and sought signs of stability even as the war in Iran continued to roil energy markets and fuel inflation concerns. Oil dropped.

summary: AI is now coding apps, drafting contracts and organizing marketing campaigns. Yet the money being spent on the technology has ballooned into a vast liability hanging over financial markets, and it's still not clear how it will all pay off
